title: Colour customised break columns

posts.author: MattFrost (Matt Frost)
posts.cookedHtml:
This is maybe a little niche, but there have been a few times on a horizontal process board where it would have been useful to be able to visually break the process up a little.
I’ve managed to do a work around by just conditionally colouring the column, but just a simple colour blocked option would be great so you can better separate the phases of longer flows.
